title: Space Explorers
tagline: Planets, rockets and black holes — curiosity at light speed.
description: A journey through the solar system and beyond. Each card carries a jaw-dropping fact, a scale comparison kids can feel ('Jupiter could hold 1,321 Earths') and a question to wonder about at bedtime.
benefits: Turns screen-time astronomy questions into card-time conversations
Scale comparisons make enormous numbers tangible
Bedtime wonder-questions end the day with curiosity
